MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-05-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Judge: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: P. Dias/D. Boffi; Reporter: Floyd Butler. Richard J. Alexander, Esq. represented Plaintiff The John Stewart Company and Defendant Janine Abbott appeared in pro per. The case settled per written stipulation of parties, not read into the record. Trial date is vacated.
